notes: Spec asserts: (1) Session appears in ready within 1s of agent launch and (2) PID bound within 1s. Both phases anchor to recording start (agent launch) and budget 1000ms. OpenCode uses a SQLite-backed store (~/.local/share/opencode/opencode.db) rather than per-cwd transcript files; the daemon's ProcessOwnedStore source observes the session via SQL polling. The proc-<PID> pre-session row appears in ~70 ms and satisfies session_birth; the UUID-keyed (ses_…) session row materialises about half a second later when opencode's first part lands.

text: Session appears in ready within 1s of agent launch
